name: Mirrorbreak Company
specialty: Specializing in complex puzzles and intricate traps, the Mirrorbreak Company has a reputation for solving the unsolvable and escaping the impossible.

members.name: Thaddeus 'Mystic' Kestrel
members.note: The loss of his left arm to a rift-beast has left him with an uncanny knack for sensing rifts before they tear open.

members.name: Zara 'Raven' Whisperwind
members.note: Her distinctive white-feathered raven companion, Crow, is as much a part of the team as any member.

visual: The Mirrorbreak Company stands out in the Undercity with their distinctive red and gold attire, adorned with mirrored symbols to ward off rift-beasts. They carry an air of quiet professionalism, their eyes always scanning for potential threats.
reputation_note: Whispers in the Undercity tell tales of the Mirrorbreak Company's uncanny ability to navigate the city's ever-shifting reality. A warning: don't cross them, for they are said to have mirrors that reflect your darkest secrets.
